settings.custom_liquid: THE LEGACY COLLECTION.

<style>
  .lgcy-hero-scroll-wrapper {
    height: 200vh;
  }
  .lgcy-hero-scroll-wrapper > .shopify-section.videoBackground {
    position: sticky !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    z-index: 2 !important;
  }
  /* Pin title to viewport center while hero is active */
  #hero-title-collection {
    position: fixed !important;
    top: 50% !important;
    left: 50% !important;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important;
    z-index: 20 !important;
    pointer-events: none !important;
  }
  .lgcy-clear-layer {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 6;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip-path: inset(100% 0 0 0);
  }
  .lgcy-clear-layer .fullscreen-video-wrap {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .lgcy-wipe-line {
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: #ff0000;
    z-index: 50;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  /* Hide duplicate banner on desktop */
  #shopify-section-banner {
    display: none !important;
  }
  @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .lgcy-hero-scroll-wrapper { height: auto !important; }
    .lgcy-hero-scroll-wrapper > .shopify-section.videoBackground { position: relative !important; }
    .lgcy-clear-layer, .lgcy-wipe-line { display: none !important; }
    #hero-title-collection { position: absolute !important; }
    #shopify-section-banner { display: block !important; }
  }
</style>
<script>
  (function() {
    function initHeroEffect() {
      var section = document.querySelector('.videoBackground');
      if (!section) return;
      if (window.innerWidth <= 749) return;

      /* hide duplicate banner */
      var banner = document.getElementById('shopify-section-banner');
      if (banner) banner.style.display = 'none';

      var wrapper = document.createElement('div');
      wrapper.className = 'lgcy-hero-scroll-wrapper';
      section.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, section);
      wrapper.appendChild(section);

      var origVideo = section.querySelector('.video-js');
      if (origVideo) {
        origVideo.style.filter = 'blur(18px) brightness(1.8) contrast(1.0)';
        origVideo.style.transform = 'scale(1.06)';
        origVideo.style.transformOrigin = 'center center';
      }

      var origWrap = section.querySelector('.fullscreen-video-wrap');
      var clearLayer = document.createElement('div');
      clearLayer.className = 'lgcy-clear-layer';
      if (origWrap) {
        var clonedWrap = origWrap.cloneNode(true);
        var clonedVideo = clonedWrap.querySelector('video');
        if (clonedVideo) {
          clonedVideo.style.filter = 'brightness(1.8) contrast(1.0)';
          clonedVideo.muted = true;
          clonedVideo.loop = true;
          clonedVideo.play().catch(function(){});
        }
        clearLayer.appendChild(clonedWrap);
      }
      section.appendChild(clearLayer);

      var line = document.createElement('div');
      line.className = 'lgcy-wipe-line';
      section.appendChild(line);

      var titleEl = document.getElementById('hero-title-collection');
      var heroHeight = window.innerHeight;

      function onScroll() {
        var scrollY = window.pageYOffset;
        var progress = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, scrollY / heroHeight));
        var clearPct = (progress * 100).toFixed(2);
        var blurPct = (100 - parseFloat(clearPct)).toFixed(2);
        clearLayer.style.clipPath = 'inset(' + blurPct + '% 0 0 0)';
        line.style.bottom = clearPct + '%';
        /* scroll text upward with wipe */
        if (titleEl) {
          var topPct = 50 - progress * 65;
          titleEl.style.top = topPct.toFixed(2) + '%';
          titleEl.style.visibility = topPct < -10 ? 'hidden' : 'visible';
        }
      }
      window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
      onScroll();
    }
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initHeroEffect);
    } else {
      initHeroEffect();
    }
  })();
</script>

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer:
Our orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.

Estimated Shipping Times:

United States & Canada: 7–12 business days

Europe: 7–12 business days

UAE & Middle East: 10–14 business days

Rest of the World: 7–12 business days

settings.question: What does the warranty include?
settings.answer: Our warranty does not cover damage caused by personal misuse or destruction, and applies only to defects resulting from manufacturing errors or material faults.

settings.question: Any question?
settings.answer: You can reach us through our contact page. We will be happy to assist you.
